title: hibbertia fumana
intro: Hibbertia fumana, commonly known as the yellow sedge, is a small, shrub-like plant native to Australia. The plant is used in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Hibbertia fumana are said to provide relief from skin irritations, wounds, and infections, as well as offering antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture or infused in oil for topical use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb.
